name: Shandong Haihua Co.,Ltd
summary: Shandong Haihua Co.,Ltd, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells chemical products in China. Its products include soda ash, industry salt, bromide, calcium chloride, potassium sulfate, magnesium chloride, and other products. The company's products are used in light, chemical, metallurgy, building material, medical, and other industries. It also exports its products to approximately 40 countries. Shandong Haihua Co.,Ltd was founded in 1998 and is based in Weifang, China.
